Transformers.js and ONNX Runtime Web notice

The files in vendor/transformers/ are unmodified redistributions:
- transformers.min.js from @huggingface/transformers (Transformers.js),
  Copyright Hugging Face, licensed under the Apache License 2.0.
  Source: https://github.com/huggingface/transformers.js
- ort-wasm-simd-threaded.asyncify.mjs and ort-wasm-simd-threaded.asyncify.wasm
  from onnxruntime-web, Copyright Microsoft Corporation, licensed under the
  MIT License. Source: https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime

The word-alignment model in vendor/alignment-model/ is an int8 ONNX export of
a multilingual BERT encoder (bert-base-multilingual-cased lineage, truncated
to 8 hidden layers for awesome-align-style word alignment). BERT multilingual
weights are released by Google under the Apache License 2.0.
